name: Power an AI agent task with Twilio on autopilot

options.systemMessage: You are a research assistant specialist for the ai agents team. Use the attached tools to look up real data before answering тАФ never invent request details. Keep answers under 150 words, cite which tool you used, and escalate anything you cannot verify.

parameters.toolDescription: Fetch live request data from the internal REST API by id or query.

nodes.name: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

parameters.message: =тЬЕ Power an AI agent task with Twilio on autopilot тАФ run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf00052-request`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Normalize Request Payload

### Normalize Request Payload

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming request records to a stable schema

Next: Reason & Act (AI Agent)

### Reason & Act (AI Agent)

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Ports: тСатЖТ Shape Agent Output ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЪа failures exit via the error rail

### Groq Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `languageModel`

ЁЯФС Groq API key

### Search Reference Wiki

Reference lookup tool for general-knowledge questions.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Lookup API Data

Tool the agent can call to hit the REST API with parameters it chooses at runtime.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `tool`

### Conversation Memory

Conversation memory keyed by session тАФ the bot remembers earlier turns for each user separately.

Feeds **Reason & Act (AI Agent)** as `memory`

### Shape Agent Output

Shapes the item: writes `answer`, `confidence`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Confident Enough?

### Confident Enough?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.confidence }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: тСатЖТ Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Escalate to Human Queue

### Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

Appends a new row to 'Request Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Join Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
### Escalate to Human Queue

Sends an SMS via Twilio тАФ reserved for urgent alerts since SMS costs money per message, unlike chat notifications.

Ports: тСатЖТ Join Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Twilio SID + token

### Join Outcomes

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Stamp Completion Time

### Stamp Completion Time

Stamps `completedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Persist Run Metadata

### Persist Run Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record тАФ searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Fingerprint for Idempotency

### Fingerprint for Idempotency

Custom JavaScript: Build a stable idempotency key per request (djb2 hash, no deps)

Next: Drop Already-Processed Items

### Drop Already-Processed Items

Cross-execution dedupe: remembers keys it has processed before and drops repeats тАФ the idempotency guard.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

### Append Audit Row (Google Sheets)

Appends a new row to 'Request Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

Ports: тСатЖТ Send Summary to Twilio ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

### Send Summary to Twilio

Sends an SMS via Twilio тАФ reserved for urgent alerts since SMS costs money per message, unlike chat notifications.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Twilio SID + token

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#ai-ops`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

Next: Park in Dead-Letter Queue

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Park in Dead-Letter Queue

Appends a new row to 'Request Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

# Power an AI agent task with Twilio on autopilot

**Pattern:** AI Agent ┬╖ **Level:** Production ┬╖ **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Power an AI agent task with Twilio on autopilot. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual research assistant is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook тЖТ Normalize Request Payload тЖТ Reason & Act (AI Agent) тЖТ Shape Agent Output тЖТ Confident Enough? тЖТ Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets тЖТ Join Outcomes тЖТ тАж

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai agent without manual effort
- Anyone automating research assistant in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; Groq API key; Slack OAuth2; Twilio SID + token.
Follow the color key: ЁЯЯж entry ┬╖ ЁЯЯк AI ┬╖ ЁЯЯл actions ┬╖ тмЬ utilities ┬╖ ЁЯЯй outputs ┬╖ ЁЯЯе error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath тАФ read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger тАФ hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click тЖТ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

Uses an AI Agent, not a fixed Chain, because the assistant must choose which tool answers the question тАФ a Chain would need one hard-coded branch per tool. The 'Confident Enough?' gate after the agent routes low-confidence answers to a human queue instead of shipping an uncertain answer: a little latency traded for not eroding trust.

## Practice exercises

Already production-grade тАФ deepen your understanding:

1. Add one more tool to the pool with a clear one-line description and watch how the agent decides to use it.
2. Change the confidence threshold on 'Confident Enough?' and see how often answers get escalated to a human.
3. Swap the Think tool for a Vector Store tool wired to a real knowledge base and turn this into RAG.

## ЁЯЫЯ Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3├Ч with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail тЖТ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Failures are also parked in a dead-letter queue for replay. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ЁЯФР Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials тАФ never in node parameters.

## ЁЯдЦ AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens тАФ keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ЁЯЫа Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ЁЯФС lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your research assistant process. Every node card explains its role тАФ safe to extend at any marked branch.

main.node: Deliver Answer + Log to Google Sheets

json.query: What's our refund policy for orders over $500?
